name: Taranis Aerial Intelligence and Crop Monitoring API
what_it_does: Taranis aerial intelligence and crop monitoring REST API for agricultural enterprises, crop advisors, and agronomists to access ultra-high-resolution aerial imagery, AI-powered crop disease detection, pest identification, and field-level agronomic insights — enabling automated field scouting, early disease detection, agronomic decision support, and crop health monitoring through Taranis's proprietary aircraft imagery and AI analysis platform covering millions of acres across North America, Brazil, Ukraine, and other agricultural markets. Enables AI agents to manage field imaging for aerial crop survey automation, handle disease detection for early agricultural threat identification automation, access pest identification for integrated pest management automation, retrieve crop stress analysis for irrigation and nutrition intervention automation, manage field report for agronomic decision support automation, handle spatial data for precision agriculture variable rate application automation, access yield prediction for harvest planning automation, retrieve historical imagery for crop performance trend automation, manage alert for critical crop issue notification automation, and integrate Taranis with precision agriculture platforms, crop advisory services, and agricultural ERP for data-driven crop management automation.
use_cases: Detecting crop diseases and pest infestations early through ultra-high-resolution aerial imagery analysis automation agents
Generating field-level agronomic reports for crop advisors and agronomists from aerial scouting data automation agents
Integrating Taranis crop health data with precision agriculture platforms for variable rate application automation agents
Monitoring large-scale commercial crop fields for stress indicators and yield-limiting factors for grower automation agents
not_for: Small hobby farms (Taranis serves commercial-scale agricultural operations)
Forest or non-cropland monitoring (Taranis focuses on arable crops, not forestry or rangeland)
Real-time live video streaming (Taranis is post-flight analysis, not live aerial streaming)
best_when: A large-scale agricultural enterprise, crop consulting firm, or precision agriculture platform wanting AI agents to access ultra-high-resolution aerial imagery with AI-powered disease and pest detection for commercial crop fields.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED: Taranis service requires enterprise contract with minimum acreage commitment; automated developer self-service API access assumption creates no API access; automated must have active Taranis enterprise customer relationship. IMAGERY DEPENDS ON FLIGHT SCHEDULE: Taranis imagery is captured through scheduled flights or contracted data providers; automated on-demand anytime imagery assumption creates no_flight_scheduled for uncovered time windows; automated must align with Taranis flight schedule for field coverage. MINIMUM ACREAGE THRESHOLDS: Taranis targets commercial farms with significant acreage; automated small-field API access assumption creates minimum_acreage_not_met; automated must have sufficient farm scale for Taranis commercial service. AI DETECTION REQUIRES VALIDATION: Taranis AI disease/pest detections are probabilistic; automated unvalidated automated treatment assumption based on Taranis alerts creates agronomic risk; automated must include agronomist validation workflow for AI-detected threats.

auth.notes: Taranis uses OAuth2 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Tel Aviv, Israel HQ (with US operations). Founded 2015 by Ofir Schlam and Kobi Schvimer. Products: Ultra-high-resolution aerial imagery, AI disease/pest detection, crop stress analysis, field scouting reports, yield prediction, integration with precision ag platforms. SDKs: None public. Enterprise contract required. Operations in US, Brazil, Ukraine, and other markets. Backed by Amadeus Capital, Grove Ventures. Competes with Ceres Imaging for commercial aerial crop intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Pilot program evaluation; production requires enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-acre pricing based on coverage area; enterprise annual contracts; data API add-on pricing
pricing.notes: Tel Aviv IL / US ops. Enterprise contract. Per-acre pricing. Commercial agriculture focus. AI disease detection.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; imagery retrieval and analysis APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: FLIGHT-DEPENDENT DATA AVAILABILITY: Taranis imagery is only available after scheduled aircraft flights; automated on-demand imagery assumption creates no_data_available for fields not yet flown; automated must check flight schedule and image availability before requesting field analysis

LARGE IMAGE FILES: Ultra-high-resolution aerial imagery files are large (multi-GB per field); automated small-payload API assumption creates timeout and storage issues; automated must implement chunked download and appropriate storage for large imagery files

AI DETECTIONS REQUIRE AGRONOMIST REVIEW: Taranis AI-detected disease/pest alerts have variable confidence scores; automated immediate spray recommendation based on AI detection creates agronomic and cost risk; automated must implement agronomist review workflow for validated treatment decisions

GEOSPATIAL DATA FORMAT: Taranis returns field data in geospatial formats (GeoJSON, shapefiles); automated non-GIS data handling assumption creates parsing challenges; automated must implement geospatial data handling for field boundary and imagery data

ENTERPRISE RELATIONSHIP GATES API: Taranis API access is gated by enterprise customer relationship; automated open developer access assumption creates no available endpoint; automated must be active Taranis enterprise customer before API integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Aerial crop intelligence. GDPR, US farm data privacy. OAuth2. US/Brazil/Ukraine. Field imagery and agronomic data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Aerial ag intelligence. GDPR, farm data privacy. OAuth2. Multi-country. Field imagery and crop data.
